chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.857 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.3653/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3654/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 06.03.2026 Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------- None present of applicant/surety. Along with urgent application, applicant/surety has moved application for return of surety. It appears that interim pre-arrest bail was granted to applicant Syed Noman Shan sonof Syed Abrar Shah by this Court vide order dated 28.03.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Nasreen Abrar wife of Syed Abrar Hussain furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.200,000/-. Perusal of record reflects that interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant/accused above named was recalled by this Court vide order dated 09.02.2026 and instant criminal bail application was dismissed, hence the surety furnished is no more required. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid orders has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules.
Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
